plugins.name: design-an-interface
plugins.description: Generate multiple radically different interface designs for a module using parallel sub-agents

plugins.name: git-guardrails-claude-code
plugins.description: Set up Claude Code hooks to block dangerous git commands before they execute

plugins.name: grill-me
plugins.description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until reaching shared understanding

plugins.name: improve-codebase-architecture
plugins.description: Explore a codebase to find architectural improvement opportunities, focusing on testability and deep modules

plugins.name: prd-to-issues
plugins.description: Break a PRD into independently-grabbable GitHub issues using tracer-bullet vertical slices

plugins.name: prd-to-plan
plugins.description: Turn a PRD into a multi-phase implementation plan using tracer-bullet vertical slices

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: Interactive QA session where user reports bugs conversationally and the agent files GitHub issues

plugins.name: request-refactor-plan
plugins.description: Create a detailed refactor plan with tiny commits via user interview, filed as a GitHub issue

plugins.name: ubiquitous-language
plugins.description: Extract a DDD-style ubiquitous language glossary from the current conversation

plugins.name: write-a-prd
plugins.description: Create a PRD through user interview, codebase exploration, and module design

plugins.name: write-a-skill
plugins.description: Create new agent skills with proper structure, progressive disclosure, and bundled resources
